song.title: Hallelujah For The Cross
song.lyrics: [V1] . A D A 1) Up to the hill of Calvary, . F#m D E My Savior went courageously . A/C# D - E - F#m And there He bled and died for me, . D E Hallelujah for the cross . A D A And on that day the world was changed, . F#m D E A final, perfect Lamb was slain . A/C# D - E - F#m Let earth and heaven now proclaim, . D E A Hallelujah for the cross [C] Chorus . D E A F#m E Hallelujah for the war He fought, love has won, death has lost . D E F#m D E A Hallelujah for the souls He bought, Hallelujah for the cross [V2] . A D A 2) What good I’ve done could never save, . F#m D E My debt too great for deeds to pay . A/C# D - E - F#m But God, my Savior, made a way, . D E Hallelujah for the cross . A D A A slave to sin, my life was bound, . F#m D E But all my chains fell to the ground . A/C# D - E - F#m When Jesus’ blood came flowing down, . D E A Hallelujah for the cross [V3] . A D A 3) And when I breathe my final breath, . F#m D E I’ll have no need to fear that rest . A/C# D - E - F#m This hope will guide me into death, . D E A Hallelujah for the cross
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C
